evals.prompt: Help me write an ADK agent in Python that outputs A2UI v0.8 JSON showing a product card with an image, name, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Include the full agent code and example A2UI JSON output.
evals.expected_output: Python ADK agent using google-adk with correct A2UI v0.8 messages (surfaceUpdate with flat adjacency-list components including Card, Image, Text, Button; followed by beginRendering). Should include dataModelUpdate for dynamic data binding and a complete working code example.

assertions.name: uses-surfaceUpdate-not-updateComponents
assertions.description: Response uses v0.8 surfaceUpdate message type (not v0.9 updateComponents)

assertions.name: flat-adjacency-list
assertions.description: Components are defined as a flat list with ID references, not a deeply nested JSON tree

assertions.name: includes-beginRendering
assertions.description: Response includes a beginRendering message after the surfaceUpdate

assertions.name: all-four-components-present
assertions.description: Response includes Card, Image, Text (for name and price), and Button components

assertions.name: button-has-action
assertions.description: Button component has an action property for 'Add to Cart'

assertions.name: adk-agent-instantiated
assertions.description: Python code instantiates an ADK Agent with model, name, instruction, and tools parameters

evals.prompt: Write a complete A2UI v0.8 surface for a multi-step checkout form. It should have a TextField for email, a MultipleChoice for shipping method (Standard, Express, Overnight), a summary Card showing order total, and a submit Button. Use data binding so the form state is stored in the data model and the summary card reads from it.
evals.expected_output: Complete A2UI v0.8 JSON with: surfaceUpdate containing flat adjacency-list components (TextField, MultipleChoice, Card, Button, Text components); data binding using path references for email and shipping selection; dataModelUpdate with initial state; beginRendering as the final message. Components should be properly connected via ID references.

assertions.name: uses-flat-adjacency-list
assertions.description: All components are in a flat list with ID references, not nested JSON

assertions.name: textfield-has-data-binding
assertions.description: TextField uses value: { path: '...' } to bind email to the data model

assertions.name: multiplechoice-present
assertions.description: MultipleChoice (or ChoicePicker) component present with options for shipping methods

assertions.name: card-reads-from-data-model
assertions.description: Summary Card contains Text components that use path binding to show order data

assertions.name: dataModelUpdate-included
assertions.description: dataModelUpdate message included to initialize form state

assertions.name: beginRendering-is-last
assertions.description: beginRendering is the final message in the sequence

evals.prompt: I set up A2UI and my surface isn't rendering. I'm sending surfaceUpdate messages with my components but the client shows a blank screen. What could be wrong? Walk me through the most common causes.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the most common cause: missing beginRendering message. Also covers: wrong root component ID, sending beginRendering before surfaceUpdate, invalid surface ID, schema errors. Should give concrete before/after JSON examples.

assertions.name: identifies-missing-beginRendering-as-primary-cause
assertions.description: Identifies missing beginRendering as the first/primary cause of blank screen

assertions.name: explains-ordering-requirement
assertions.description: Explains that beginRendering must come after surfaceUpdate (ordering matters)

assertions.name: mentions-root-id-mismatch
assertions.description: Mentions that the root field in beginRendering must match a component id in the surfaceUpdate

assertions.name: shows-correct-example
assertions.description: Shows a correct JSON example with surfaceUpdate followed by beginRendering
